title: Nothing But The Blood (Tommee Profitt)
lyrics:
Verse 1
What can wash away my sin
What can make me whole again
Nothing but the precious blood of Jesus
For my pardon this I see
For my cleansing this my plea
Nothing but the precious blood of Jesus
Chorus
O precious is the flow
That washes white as snow
No other fount I know
Only the blood of Jesus
And O through Him I'll overcome
By this I'll reach my home
No other fount I know
Nothing but the blood of Jesus
Verse 2
Nothing can for sin atone
Nothing good that I have done
Nothing but the precious blood of Jesus
This is all my hope and peace
This is all my righteousness
Nothing but the precious blood of Jesus
Bridge
Lamb of God who hung upon the tree
His blood has set us free
Righteous One the shelter for the poor
Heaven's open door
We sing glory glory
Hallelujah
This blood it will never lose its pow'r
No it will never lose its pow'r
Tag
No other fount I know
Nothing but the blood of Jesus
No other fount I know
Ending
What can wash away my sin
Nothing but the blood of Jesus
